display_name.description: The display name for the group

assignable_to_role.description: Indicates whether this group can be assigned to an Azure Active Directory role

auto_subscribe_new_members.description: Indicates whether new members added to the group will be auto-subscribed to receive email notifications

behaviors.description: The group behaviors for a Microsoft 365 group

external_senders_allowed.description: Indicates whether external senders can send emails to group

hide_from_address_lists.description: Indicates whether the group is displayed in certain parts of the Outlook user interface

hide_from_outlook_clients.description: Indicates whether the group is displayed in Outlook clients

mail_nickname.description: The mail alias for the group

members.description: A list of member object IDs to add to the group

owners.description: A list of owner object IDs to add to the group

prevent_duplicate_names.description: If true, will return an error if an existing group exists with the same name

provisioning_options.description: A list of provisioning options for a Microsoft 365 group

security_enabled.description: Whether the group is a security group

theme.description: The color theme for a Microsoft 365 group

types.description: A list of group types to configure for the group

visibility.description: The group join policy and group content visibility
